description:
Goal: the docs should describe the corrected engine, and the quicksort trace should remain the reproducible signal. Signal: `northstar.html`, `.agent/docs/telemetry.md`, and the ignored quicksort dump harness all describe lazy runtime bootstrap, state-change-only emission, and how to rerun/analyze the trace. Strategy: fold the cleanup-arc invariants into the design/docs after the code changes settle, then keep the trace harness as the regression probe.

Change:
- Update `northstar.html` to describe the quieter closure boundary and lazy runtime bootstrap.
- Update `.agent/docs/telemetry.md` with the Compiler2 rule that emit sites send raw ids/facts and only on state change.
- Keep the ignored quicksort JSONL dump harness documented as the reproducible signal for this arc.

Why:
- This cleanup arc changes the observable contract; the docs need to become the guideposts for the next tickets.

Checks:
- The docs match the code and the quicksort trace.
- The harness path and rerun command are captured in the docs.
title: Compiler2 docs: publish the corrected closure and telemetry contract
